title: 低開発国と観光業②（否定・結論）
prompt: More and more people travel to undeveloped countries for holidays. Is this a positive or negative development for the host country?
prompt_jp: 観光業の否定的側面と結論を述べよ。
outline_jp: 対比: 否定的側面に注意を促す
帰結: 地元民が追い出される
理由: 観光の高賃金が農業から人を引き離す
例: 文化の変化が起こる
結論: 適切な道か検討すべき
model_answer: However, it is worth pointing out that tourism has a negative side we should call attention to.
As areas grow in popularity, tourism can push out local people who cannot afford higher prices.
This is largely because higher wages in tourism draw people away from farming and fishing.
For example, cultural change may transpire, as young people embrace hip-hop over local traditions.
In conclusion, host countries should consider whether tourism is the right course of action.

items.collocation: it is worth pointing out that …

drills.jp: しかし、観光には注意を促すべき否定的側面があると指摘する価値がある。
drills.model_en: However, it is worth pointing out that tourism has a negative side.

drills.jp: これは主に、観光業の高い賃金が人々を農業から引き離すからだ。
drills.model_en: This is largely because higher wages in tourism draw people away from farming.

drills.jp: 結論として、受入国は観光が適切な道か検討すべきだ。
drills.model_en: In conclusion, host countries should consider whether to embrace tourism as the right course.
